name: HomeTeam Inspection Service
description: Comprehensive mold inspection and testing services for homes.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: Very thorough, the inspector was very knowledgeable and trustworthy. They also followed up with calls
Great communication from start to finish. Josh is very knowledgeable and follows through to ensure everything is done satisfactorily.
Very professional. They takes their time in every aspect of the inspection and is very knowledgeable. Would highly recommend to all.
I was very impressed to be able to speak with the owner upon first phone call. Great company!

sentiment.summary: HomeTeam Inspection Service has an overwhelmingly positive reputation, with customers consistently praising their thorough inspections, knowledgeable inspectors, professional communication, and detailed explanations throughout the process.
